---
title: "The Rev. Henry Bennett"
---

## The Rev. Henry Bennett

**Dates:** (1795-1874)

### Description

Rector of Sparkford

### Biography

He married (1821) Emily Moberly, daughter of Edward Moberly of St Petersburg and sister of Rt. Rev. George Moberly [LG 1906]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
